title: Prisma Press Backend
description: A REST API built with Node.js, Express.js, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, JWT Authentication, and Role-Based Authorization for managing blogs and users.

title: Pet Haven
description: A full-stack pet adoption platform with user authentication, pet management, responsive design, and Firebase deployment.

title: Portfolio Website
description: A modern and responsive personal portfolio website built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion to showcase my skills and projects.
